---
title: "Experiments Dashboard"
---

## Experimental Design

- **Goal**: systematically validate each claim in `claims.qmd`
- **Compute budget**: [e.g., ~N GPU-hours on single A100 / RTX 4090]
- **Reproducibility seed**: `seed=42` fixed in all runs; results reported as mean ± std over [K] seeds

```{dot}
//| label: fig-exp-design
//| fig-cap: "Experiment suite: claim coverage"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.5
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    C1 [label="Claim 1", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    C2 [label="Claim 2", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    C3 [label="Claim 3", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    Main [label="Main Expt"]
    Abl  [label="Ablation"]
    HP   [label="HP Search"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    R1 [label="Results 1", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    R2 [label="Results 2", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    R3 [label="Results 3", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  C1 -> Main  C2 -> Abl  C3 -> HP
  Main -> R1  Abl -> R2  HP -> R3
}
```

---

## Dataset

- **Name**: [dataset name and version]
- **Size**: [N_train / N_val / N_test] samples; [D] features; [C] classes / continuous target
- **Source**: [origin — UCI / Kaggle / custom / synthetic]
- **Preprocessing**: standardisation, missing-value handling, class-imbalance strategy
- **Splits**: [stratified k-fold / random / time-based] — consistent across all experiments

```{dot}
//| label: fig-data-pipeline
//| fig-cap: "Data pipeline from raw source to model input"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Raw   [label="Raw Data",   fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Split [label="Train/Val/Test"]
  Norm  [label="Normalise"]
  Batch [label="DataLoader", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  Raw -> Split -> Norm -> Batch
}
```

---

## Baselines

| Baseline | Description | Reference |
|----------|-------------|-----------|
| Linear | Logistic regression | scikit-learn |
| MLP-vanilla | MLP without key components | this repo |
| [SotA method] | [description] | [citation] |

- All baselines trained with identical optimiser, lr, and seed
- Hyperparameters for each baseline tuned with the same Optuna budget

---

## Experiment Suite

::: {.card-grid}
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="main.qmd">Main Experiment</a>
<p>Full model vs. all baselines on held-out test set</p>
</div>
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="ablation.qmd">Ablation Study</a>
<p>Component-by-component contribution analysis</p>
</div>
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="hyperparam.qmd">HP Sensitivity</a>
<p>Effect of key hyperparameters on performance</p>
</div>
:::

```{dot}
//| label: fig-exp-nav
//| fig-cap: "Experiment types and their primary metrics"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.8
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.6, nodesep=0.45]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph col1 {
    rank=same
    E1 [label="Main Expt",  fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    E2 [label="Ablation",   fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    E3 [label="HP Search",  fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph col2 {
    rank=same
    M1 [label="Primary Metric"]
    M2 [label="Delta per\nComponent"]
    M3 [label="Sensitivity\nCurve"]
  }
  subgraph col3 {
    rank=same
    Out [label="Validated\nClaims", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  E1 -> M1  E2 -> M2  E3 -> M3
  M1 -> Out  M2 -> Out  M3 -> Out
}
```
